creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Piotr Smyrak from comment #11)
I already have devel/appstream installed as a dependency of x11-toolkits/libadwaita, which is pulled in as a dependency of editors/ghex.

It would be because my bare-metal builds went fine, while poudriere builds fail.
Poudriere is a clean room builder that disallows hidden (implicit) dependencies.
All dependencies (direct and indirect) must appear as explicit dependencies somewhere in the explicit dependency chains (including ones via USES).
